what: Implement sidebar project selector with active project switching and a create entry that opens the same onboarding flow in cancelable mode without blocking existing context.

where.description: Render project list, active indicator, switch action, and create entry.
Add behavior tests for switching, create entry open, and cancel return.
Mount selector in app shell/sidebar context.

acceptance.when: User selects another project in sidebar
acceptance.then: Active project changes and dependent UI reads the new active context.

acceptance.given: User opens create flow from sidebar and cancels
acceptance.then: Previous active context is preserved and no project state mutation occurs.

patterns.name: CQRS Hook Usage
patterns.reference: ARCHITECTURE.md section 4 web query/mutation hook separation

context: Users need low-friction project context switching once at least one project exists.
technicalNotes: Selector must use hooks; no direct network calls in component. Merge-safe: add component + tests and shell mount only. Models: Codex gpt-5.2-codex (medium), Claude Sonnet 4.6 (medium).
